name: Dyno Nobel Limited.
analysis: DNL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$3.7321. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$3.7709 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$3.7321, stop A$3.5261, target A$3.7642. Risk/reward is 0.16:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
